device_name: Vantage Galan 3T, MRT-3020, V9.0 with AiCE Reconstruction Processing Unit for MR
intended_use: Vantage Galan 3T systems are indicated for use as a diagnostic imaging modality that produces cross-sectional transaxial, coronal, sagittal, and oblique images that display anatomic structures of the
intended_use_full: Vantage Galan 3T systems are indicated for use as a diagnostic imaging modality that produces cross-sectional transaxial, coronal, sagittal, and oblique images that display anatomic structures of the head or body. Additionally, this system is capable of non-contrast enhanced imaging, such as MRA.
ground_truth: For PIQE: 6 USA board-certified radiologists blinded review; For NeuroLine+: manual annotation by 2 ARRT licensed technologists; For IMC: 3 US board-certified neuro radiologists blinded review; For Free Breathing Dynamic: 2 US board-certified radiologists blinded review
other_metrics: Exsper 3D: reduced artifacts vs conventional SPEEDER; Slice Shim: equal to or better images vs standard shim; UTE CG Recon: better resolution and SNR maintenance vs grid recon; DSD Filter: equivalent low-contrast capability with greater denoising; Ringing Correction: reduced ringing artifacts; Auto Scan Assist: less time and steps vs manual positioning; Ceiling Camera: less or comparable patient setting time vs manual; PIQE: up to 9x matrix expansion with maintained image quality; NeuroLine+: 96.0% success rate for auto-positioning; IMC: significant motion artifact reduction; Free Breathing Dynamic: 94.4% arterial phase detection success

recalls.reason: There is a potential for formation of ice occurring in the venting system of the superconducting magnet of the MRI systems. if a quench occurs in this condition, helium gas may not be able to escape via the designed vent paths, and the pressure in the helium vessel may rise.  This pressure build-up could eventually rupture the helium vessel, causing helium gas to be released into the MR scanning room.

The terminal block used to secure the power supply cable for the gradient coil of the MRI system was not secured as designed, which could cause cable disconnection, which could lead to arcing, followed by melting of the cable, ignition, smoke, and fire.
recalls.product_description: MRI systems: Vantage Orian MRT-1550 (MEXL-1550), Vantage Elan MRT-2020 (MEXL-1520), Vantage Titan MRT-1504 (MEXL-1504), Vantage Titan 3T MRT-3010 (MEXL-3010), Vantage Galan 3T MRT-3020 (MEXL-3020)
